summary.content: Data Scientist with 3+ years of experience delivering statistically rigorous insights across retail, sports analytics, and fintech. Skilled in causal inference, A/B experimentation, predictive modeling, and translating complex analytical findings into decisive product and business strategies. Proven record deploying production-ready models (time series, propensity, uplift) on AWS, with a 51% portfolio return and 38% uplift in search precision among key outcomes.

experience.title: Founding Engineer, Data and AI Applications
experience.company: Alphonso AI, Shipley Center for Innovation
bullets: Architected a hybrid Dense Vector + BM25 retrieval system; tuned embedding strategies and Cross-Encoder reranking hyperparameters to boost search precision by 38%, while reducing LLM hallucinations in production.
Built AWS (S3, Glue) data pipelines centralizing behavioral event data; automated feature engineering and Grafana drift monitoring to ensure production model reliability.
Developed engagement-scoring models and performed funnel analysis on MVP session data, identifying drop-off points that informed critical pre-launch UI/UX redesigns.

experience.title: Graduate Equity Research Analyst
experience.company: Student Managed Investment Fund, Clarkson University
bullets: Co-managed a $650K equity portfolio delivering 51% total return, outperforming the S&P 500 benchmark by 2,600 bps.
Automated fundamental analysis via the SEC EDGAR API and Google Vertex AI, cutting manual research time by 40% and feeding structured data into DCF and WACC valuation models.

Built a social-sentiment NLP engine and Monte Carlo simulation models to validate investment theses and stress-test portfolio positions, quantifying potential drawdowns and supporting high-conviction trade decisions.

experience.title: Data Science Consultant
bullets: Applied Uplift Modeling (CausalML) to segment persuadable fans and designed A/B experiments for dynamic ticket-pricing strategies; used Power Analysis to confirm sample sizes, validating a statistically significant 12% price optimization.
Refactored PySpark ETL scripts processing 1M+ cross-channel events (GA4, CRM); applied AWS Glue partition pruning to reduce data latency by 30%, accelerating reporting and model training cycles.
Built behavioral clustering models on purchase history and engagement metrics to create personalized campaign cohorts, increasing email open rates across targeted segments.

experience.title: Business Data Analyst
bullets: Developed a hybrid demand-forecasting model (Prophet + SARIMAX) across 1,500+ SKUs, improving forecast accuracy by 15% MAPE on approximately 800K daily Oracle Fusion ERP transaction records.
Productionized GxP-compliant ML workflows on Oracle Cloud Infrastructure with real-time alerting, achieving 99.9% uptime for critical inventory-monitoring systems.
Deployed automated KPI dashboards in Oracle Analytics Cloud, eliminating 12+ hours per week of manual reporting for the procurement team.

experience.title: Data Analyst
bullets: Built scalable PySpark and Databricks pipelines ingesting 10M+ rows from 30+ heterogeneous panel and survey sources, reducing processing latency by 40%.
Designed complex sampling strategies and applied regression models to deliver representative consumer insights for 10+ FMCG and Telecom clients across Middle East and Central Africa markets.
Developed Power BI dashboards used by 10+ stakeholders to track campaign performance and support multi-million-dollar go-to-market investment strategies.
